title: The FPS: King Performance
description: A lightweight and highly stable client-side performance modpack configured to optimize frame rates for PojavLauncher and low-spec hardware.
body:
# 👑 The FPS: King Performance

**The FPS King** is a lightweight, client-side performance baseline designed to maximize frame rates and stability. By pairing essential open-source optimization mods with meticulously tuned configuration files, this pack delivers a smooth, stutter-free gameplay experience without altering the vanilla core.

Whether you are optimizing your setup for mobile devices via PojavLauncher or squeezing extra performance out of an older, low-spec desktop PC, **The FPS King** provides the ultimate lightweight foundation.

---

## ⚡ FEATURES & KEY BENEFITS

### 🚀 Maximum Frame Stability
* **Next-Gen Rendering:** Powered by the modern rendering ecosystem to heavily reduce CPU and GPU overhead compared to vanilla engine routines.
* **Smooth World Generation:** Features optimized asynchronous threading to minimize micro-stutters and lag spikes during fast chunk loading.
* **Optimized Memory Usage:** Tuned garbage collection configurations to keep heap allocation light and stable, preventing out-of-memory crashes on low-RAM setups.

### 🧹 Advanced Geometry & Entity Culling
* **Smart Occlusion Culling:** Stops rendering hidden blocks, chests, and entities behind solid geometry, drastically lowering hardware stress.
* **Lightweight Models:** Renders demanding block entities (such as chests and beds) using performance-friendly variations.
* **Entity Clustering:** Streamlines scattered entity rendering (like clustered XP orbs) to prevent FPS drops near heavy automated farms.

---

## 📱 LAUNCHER & MOBILE COMPATIBILITY

While built as a universal performance foundation, **The FPS King** is fully tailored for alternative platforms:

* **PojavLauncher:** Highly compatible with modern mobile rendering pipelines (**LTW** / **MobileGlues**). Reduces mobile driver overhead and keeps frame rates stable during prolonged sessions.
* **Desktop Clients:** Fully supported across all major launchers including the Modrinth App, Prism Launcher, ATLauncher, and standard Fabric environments.

---

## 🎖️ CREDITS & ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS

* **👑 Pack Creator:** Developed and actively maintained by **Tionoob19**.
* **🤝 The Modding Community:** Sincere thanks to the open-source Fabric developers and performance mod authors who make these optimizations possible.
